checks.title: Dave does not security-review generated code
checks.notes: Dave writes working code but misses security edge cases. Mitigation: review agent-written code before shipping to production. Sentinel agent (planned) will catch Orion-specific issues.

checks.title: Dave has access to secrets in workspace
checks.notes: SECRETS.md and .env.local files are readable by Dave. Mitigated: secrets scrubbed from MEMORY.md Mar 8. Never paste raw keys in chat.

checks.title: Dave file writes run with full shell permissions
checks.notes: Scripts and file writes execute as Neil on Mac Mini. No sandbox. Mitigation: review scripts before running, never run unreviewed agent code in production.

checks.title: npm packages not audited on install
checks.notes: Claude Code runs npm install without supply chain verification. Mitigation: Dependabot on all repos (done Mar 8). Run npm audit before release.

checks.title: Dependabot on all 8 active repos
checks.notes: Enabled Mar 8 via GitHub API. Weekly Monday scans. Auto-PRs for dependency vulnerabilities.

checks.title: eslint-plugin-security on all projects
checks.notes: Not yet installed. Catches: unsafe regex, unvalidated input, prototype pollution.

checks.title: Sentinel agent (Orion-specific scanner)
checks.notes: Sentinel v1 live. 6 checks: secrets in .md, missing auth middleware, hardcoded creds, tenant isolation, open CORS, unrotated keys. Results at /api/sentinel + security page.
